hero.firstText: The ladania plant, a shrub species with a distinctive purple flower, thrives on the island of Crete, particularly in the wider area of the village of Sises. The history of the plant is lost in the depths of time, with references to both its soothing properties when used as a herbal tea, and its intense fragrance, as it is a key ingredient in the making of perfumes and Bahur (or Bukhoor/Bakhoor).
hero.secondText: Harvesting the resin is a strenuous and delicate process carried out by skilled hands. Using the 'ladanisteri', a traditional tool consisting of a heavy wooden frame with hanging leather strips, collectors brush against the plant, causing the resin to stick to the strips. This way, it is slowly and methodically collected from the leaves.
hero.thirdText: The tools are then left in the sun so that the labdanum can heat up and soften, making it easier to separate. The process is completed using the 'xystra' (scraper), a special tool designed to remove the resin from the leather strips.
hero.fourthText: Once collected, the natural labdanum resin is transported to our facilities, where it undergoes careful cleaning and strict quality control. Then, through specialized processing, the raw material is gradually transformed into a refined final product, acquiring its characteristic texture, purity, and rich aroma. After this process is complete, the labdanum is ready for the packaging stage, where it is kept under strictly controlled conditions to ensure its high quality and authenticity.
hero.fifthText: Rasoulis Stylianos General Trading and SIA L.P is a family business founded in Sises, Crete in 1975. For almost five decades, our vision has been to build strong bonds of trust with our customers through the trade of premium quality Greek labdanum (لابدانوم يوناني). The labdanum trade from Crete to the Middle East dates back to antiquity. Thanks to this long-standing commercial activity, deep bonds of friendship have developed between our peoples. Today, as our customers' demands are higher than ever, we strive to fully meet their expectations by offering rapid service and exceptional quality products. Backed by years of experience and a dedicated workforce, we proudly produce labdanum of the highest quality, excellent in aroma, color, and texture.

contact.haveQuestions: Have questions about our products? We'd love to hear from you. Choose your preferred method to reach out.
